name: The 'darkness' mentioned here means the darkness of Ignorance, which throws man off
introduction:
the path of salvation and well-being and directs his energies and efforts to wrong directions
in defiance of reality. 'Light' here means the knowledge of Truth with the help of which man
comes to know his own reality and that of the universe; this knowledge also shows him the
purpose of his life, and thus leads him consciously, to adopt the Right Way.
